title: Use built-in Math.clamp methods
description: Java 21 introduced built-in Math.clamp methods for clamping values within a range. Prefer using these methods instead of custom implementations to improve code clarity and reliability.
recommendation: Replace custom clamping logic with Math.clamp methods where available.
impact: Improves code readability and reduces the risk of errors in manual clamping logic.

checks.message: Use built-in Math.clamp methods instead of manual min/max combinations.
